matches.match_rationale: Attendance data arrives from biometric terminals, manual timesheets, and spreadsheets in incompatible formats.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An AI-powered ETL layer that ingests campus attendance exports and maps them to a unified payroll-ready schema.

matches.match_rationale: Many campuses still rely on handwritten timesheets. OCR can digitize these documents automatically.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A document scanning pipeline where staff photograph paper timesheets; AI extracts employee IDs, hours, and dates.

matches.match_rationale: Anomaly detection can flag attendance entries that deviate from expected patterns before they propagate into gross pay calculations.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A pre-payroll validation layer scoring each consolidated attendance record and surfacing high-anomaly entries.

matches.match_rationale: The full consolidation workflow is a multi-step process with branching logic that a task automation agent can orchestrate.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A pre-payroll agent that fetches attendance exports from each campus, transforms and consolidates them, and flags exceptions.
